/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -g -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  -shared  -o ../bin/plasma/kcms/systemsettings/kcm_network_audio.so CMakeFiles/kcm_network_audio.dir/kcm_network_audio_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_network_audio.dir/network_audio_kcm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_network_audio.dir/network_audio_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_network_audio.dir/qrc_kcm_network_audio.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib64/libKF6KCMUtilsQuick.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib64/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libKF6KCMUtilsCore.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib64/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libKF6I18n.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib64/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
